2603.20003.title: An Agentic Approach to Generating XAI-Narratives
2603.20003.paper_summary: Explainable AI (XAI) research has experienced substantial growth in recent years. Existing XAI methods, however, have been criticized for being technical and expert-oriented, motivating the development of more interpretable and accessible explanations. In response, large language model (LLM)-generated XAI narratives have been proposed as a promising approach for translating post-hoc explanations into more accessible, natural-language explanations. In this work, we propose a multi-agent framework for XAI narrative generation and refinement. The framework comprises the Narrator, which generates and revises narratives based on feedback from multiple Critic Agents on faithfulness and coherence metrics, thereby enabling narrative improvement through iteration. We design five agentic systems (Basic Design, Critic Design, Critic-Rule Design, Coherent Design, and Coherent-Rule Design) and systematically evaluate their effectiveness across five LLMs on five tabular datasets. Results validate that the Basic Design, the Critic Design, and the Critic-Rule Design are effective in improving the faithfulness of narratives across all LLMs. Claude-4.5-Sonnet on Basic Design performs best, reducing the number of unfaithful narratives by 90% after three rounds of iteration. To address recurrent issues, we further introduce an ensemble strategy based on majority voting. This approach consistently enhances performance for four LLMs, except for DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp. These findings highlight the potential of agentic systems to produce faithful and coherent XAI narratives.
2603.20003.paper_summary_zh: 可解釋人工智慧（XAI）研究在近年來經歷了顯著增長。然而，現有的 XAI 方法因為過於技術性和專家導向而受到批評，這促使了更可解釋和易於理解的解釋的發展。作為回應，基於大型語言模型（LLM）生成的 XAI 敘事被提出作為將事後解釋轉換為更易於理解的自然語言解釋的有前景的方法。在本研究中，我們提出了一個多代理框架，用於 XAI 敘事的生成和完善。該框架包括敘述者，該角色根據多個批評代理在忠實性和一致性指標上的反饋生成和修訂敘事，從而通過迭代實現敘事的改進。我們設計了五種代理系統（基本設計、批評設計、批評規則設計、一致性設計和一致性規則設計），並在五個 LLM 上對五個表格數據集系統地評估其有效性。結果驗證了基本設計、批評設計和批評規則設計在提高所有 LLM 敘事的忠實性方面的有效性。在基本設計上，Claude-4.5-Sonnet 的表現最佳，在三輪迭代後將不忠實敘事的數量減少了 90%。為了解決重複出現的問題，我們進一步引入了一種基於多數投票的集成策略。這種方法在四個 LLM 上持續提升性能，除了 DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp。這些發現突顯了代理系統在生成忠實且一致的 XAI 敘事方面的潛力。
2603.20003.author: Yifan He et.al.
